# freeswitch_conference_profile (Resource)

A mod_conference profile (settings group). Set `video_mode = "mux"` for a video conference with composed layouts. Profiles are read when a NEW conference starts — no reload needed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A video conference profile: composed grid, 720p. Profiles are read when a
# NEW conference starts, so changes need no reload.
resource "freeswitch_conference_profile" "video_grid" {
  name       = "video-grid"
  video_mode = "mux"

  # defaults: group:grid layout, 1280x720, 15 fps, 48 kHz, MOH while alone
  video_layout      = "group:grid"
  video_canvas_size = "1280x720"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `auto_record` (String) Recording path template; empty disables recording.
- `comfort_noise` (Boolean)
- `energy_level` (Number)
- `interval_ms` (Number)
- `moh_sound` (String)
- `params` (Map of String) Extra profile params merged into the rendered XML.
- `rate` (Number)
- `video_canvas_size` (String)
- `video_fps` (Number)
- `video_layout` (String)
- `video_mode` (String) Empty = audio only; `mux` = composed video conference.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_conference_profile is imported by its name.
terraform import freeswitch_conference_profile.video_grid video-grid
```
